available.description: `true` if the server responded successfully to the health probe within `timeoutMs`. `false` on timeout, transport failure, or protocol error — workflow authors branch on this to retry / fallback / fail-soft.

name.description: Server-reported name (from MCP `initialize` response). Absent if unavailable.

latencyMs.description: Round-trip latency in milliseconds. When `available: false`, the timeout value is reported here.

error.description: When `available: false`, the last error message for diagnostic surfacing.
